criterion_description: Every required strategy feature is present in the acceptance feature product at the intended horizon.
acceptance_threshold: all required features present; no proxy-only substitute for required acceptance feature

criterion_description: Every S01-S11 module has an explicit acceptance path or explicit research/risk-only exclusion.
acceptance_threshold: no strategy has ambiguous support status

criterion_description: Only alpha strategies enter predictive/robustness promotion grids; non-alpha/risk filters are excluded from alpha promotion.
acceptance_threshold: S10/S11 excluded or separately registered as execution/risk controls

criterion_description: Feature/module support decisions cite current artifacts and missing-feature lists.
acceptance_threshold: every M02 row has evidence_source and required_next_evidence
